channel.title: yeye (en)
channel.description: Notes on ideas, technology, and life.

item.title: Design Tradeoffs in Dark Mode
item.description: Dark mode isn't just flipping the background to black. A discussion of tones, contrast, and when not to use pure black.

item.title: Hello, World: The Beginning of This Blog
item.description: Why I started writing, and the process of building this blog with Astro.
